input.instructions:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: coding-S4-ahc030-polyomino-mining
Title: S4. AHC030 / Polyomino Mining

Problem:
Given known polyomino oil-field shapes but unknown placements, recover all oil-containing cells with as little probing cost as possible using drilling, noisy aggregate queries, and final guesses.

Grading target:
Lower probing cost is better.
Contest score is derived from absolute and relative cost.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>

variables.selected_prompt_text:
Write a tentative answer and ask one reviewer child to act as a technical auditor. The reviewer must scrutinize the draft for mathematical rigor and implementation feasibility, specifically demanding the explicit formulation of any probabilistic models, objective functions, or algorithmic steps mentioned. The goal is to move from high-level conceptual descriptions to a concrete, verifiable technical specification.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "review",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "draft_response": "plain-text draft answer",
  "message_for_reviewer": "plain-text review request for the child"
}
variables.child_selected_prompt_text:
Solve the question directly.
Keep the entire JSON compact.
Keep decision_notes extremely short. Prefer 3 to 8 words.
Do not narrate your reasoning outside the response field.
In the response field, use exactly two short lines encoded with \n:
FINAL_ANSWER: <answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
Keep the justification to 12 words or fewer.
Use plain text only inside the response field. Do not use markdown formatting, code fences, or math-style backslashes such as \equiv.
Do not add any extra text before or after the JSON object.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "execute_locally",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "response": "FINAL_ANSWER: <answer>\nJUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>",
  "result_type": "summary"
}

orchestration.decision_notes: The user provided a summary of a final answer from a child node. I am formatting this into the required JSON structure.

Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: coding-S4-ahc030-polyomino-mining
Title: S4. AHC030 / Polyomino Mining

Problem:
Given known polyomino oil-field shapes but unknown placements, recover all oil-containing cells with as little probing cost as possible using drilling, noisy aggregate queries, and final guesses.

Grading target:
Lower probing cost is better.
Contest score is derived from absolute and relative cost.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>

results.content:
FINAL_ANSWER: The set of coordinates (r, c) maximizing the posterior probability P(Placement | Queries)
JUSTIFICATION: Uses Bayesian inference and maximum likelihood estimation for optimal placement recovery.
